Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IMachineVariantInfo

All Superinterfaces:
IPOGState, IState
All Known Implementing Classes:
MachineVariantInfo
public interface IMachineVariantInfo extends IPOGState
Protocol for accessing the variants of a machine.
Since:
1.0

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final IStateType<IMachineVariantInfo>
    STATE_TYPE

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    count()
    Returns the number of variants of the machine.
    Expression

    Deprecated.
    Use getExpression(int)

    Returns the parsed and type-checked variant expression.

    Returns a handle to the variant.
    boolean

    Returns whether the machine has a variant.

  • Field Details

    • STATE_TYPE

      static final IStateType<IMachineVariantInfo> STATE_TYPE

  • Method Details

    • count

      int count()
      Returns the number of variants of the machine.
      Returns:
      the number of variants of the machine
      Since:
      3.4

    • getLabel

      String getLabel(int index)
      Returns the label of a variant.
      Parameters:
      index - index of the variant
      Returns:
      the label of the variant
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is less than zero or greater than or equal to count()
      Since:
      3.4

    • getExpression

      @Deprecated Expression getExpression()
      Deprecated.
      Use getExpression(int)
      Returns the parsed and type-checked variant expression. This method has been retained for backward compatibility only. It will return a result only if the machine contains a single variant carrying the default label.
      Returns:
      the parsed and type-checked variant expression
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if there is not exactly one default variant

    • getExpression

      Expression getExpression(int index)
      Returns the parsed and type-checked variant expression.
      Parameters:
      index - index of the variant
      Returns:
      the parsed and type-checked variant expression
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is less than zero or greater than or equal to count()
      Since:
      3.4

    • getVariant

      @Deprecated ISCVariant getVariant()
      Deprecated.
      Use getVariant(int)
      Returns a handle to the variant. This method has been retained for backward compatibility only. It will return a result only if the machine contains a single variant carrying the default label.
      Returns:
      a handle to the variant
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if there is no variant

    • getVariant

      ISCVariant getVariant(int index)
      Returns a handle to the variant.
      Parameters:
      index - index of the variant
      Returns:
      a handle to the variant
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is less than zero or greater than or equal to count()
      Since:
      3.4

    • getPOName

      String getPOName(int index, String prefix, String suffix)
      Returns the name for a variant PO.
      Parameters:
      index - index of the variant
      prefix - the prefix of the PO name
      suffix - the suffix of the PO name
      Returns:
      the name of the PO
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is less than zero or greater than or equal to count()
      Since:
      3.4

    • machineHasVariant

      boolean machineHasVariant()
      Returns whether the machine has a variant. This is shortcut fully equivalent to count() != 0
      Returns:
      whether the machine has a variant
